form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.07) when fifth over 300m at this track in a Grade 5 H. Has four successes and five minors from 15 starts from box 1. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 390m at Ballarat in a handy (22.26), beating Penny's Legacy. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by a neck over 300m at this track in a handy 16.86, beating One Knee Noni. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 5 lengths win at Geelong over 400m (22.43) beating Jacaerys Bale in Grade 5 on April 14. Must be a winning chance again.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (17.01) at this track. Drawn awkwardly. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (22.97) over 400m at Geelong. Has to overcome a wide draw but in the mix on her best form.

form.formComment: Placed last time (16.86) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten a neck. Goes very well from the draw boasting eight places from 11 starts. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start easily by 3.5 lengths at Geelong (22.78) beating Miss Jo in a Mix 3/4 on March 28. Hard to go past again.
